notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Tucker reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Carlos Santana.

notableEvents.label: Mookie Betts GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mookie Betts grounds into a double play, third baseman Nolan Arenado to second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman Carlos Santana. Shohei Ohtani out at 2nd. Mookie Betts out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Shohei Ohtani GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Shohei Ohtani grounds into a double play, second baseman Ketel Marte to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Carlos Santana. Miguel Rojas out at 2nd. Shohei Ohtani out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Tucker reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Tucker reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Carlos Santana.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy grounds out, second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman Carlos Santana.

notableEvents.label: Alex Freeland pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alex Freeland flies out to left fielder Jorge Barrosa.
